title: 10 best herbal capsules for hyperthyroidism
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for hyperthyroidism are natural supplements that contain a blend of plant-based ingredients, specifically designed to alleviate symptoms associated with an overactive thyroid gland. These capsules work by regulating thyroid hormone production and reducing inflammation in the body. Examples include capsules containing ashwagandha, bladderwrack, and Bugleweed, which have been traditionally used to calm hyperthyroidism-related anxiety and insomnia. By taking these capsules, individuals suffering from hyperthyroidism may experience improved energy levels, reduced sweating, and a more balanced thyroid function, leading to enhanced overall well-being and improved quality of life.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Figwort capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they contain a natural compound called scopoletin, which has been shown to have a positive impact on thyroid function. Scopoletin is believed to help regulate the production of thyroid hormones by inhibiting the release of excess thyroxine from the thyroid gland. By doing so, figwort capsules can help alleviate symptoms such as rapid heartbeat, anxiety, and weight loss associated with hyperthyroidism, allowing individuals to experience a sense of calm and well-being.
remedy_properties: Thyrotropic activity: Figwort capsules have been shown to regulate thyroid hormone levels by stimulating the production of thyroxine (T4) and triiodothyronine (T3), which can help alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as weight loss, tremors, and anxiety.

Antithyroidal effect: The capsules' active compounds, including scropolins and lignans, have been found to inhibit the conversion of T4 to the more active form of thyroid hormone (T3), reducing the excess production of thyroid hormones that is characteristic of hyperthyroidism.
Anti-inflammatory activity: Figwort's anti-inflammatory properties can help alleviate symptoms such as joint pain and swelling associated with Graves' disease, a common cause of hyperthyroidism.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the figwort plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their ability to calm the thyroid gland and reduce inflammation, making them an effective ingredient in medicinal capsules for hyperthyroidism.

Barks: The barks of the figwort plant contain compounds that help regulate the functioning of the thyroid gland, reducing symptoms such as rapid heartbeat and weight loss associated with hyperthyroidism.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of dried scrophularia nodosa root bark.
Grind the root bark into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix 4 grams of the scrophularia nodosa root bark powder with 6 grams of excipient powder in a bowl for 5 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the powder mixture, ensuring each capsule contains 2 grams of herbal extract for 15 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dodder capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they contain compounds that help regulate thyroid function and reduce symptoms associated with an overactive thyroid gland. The herbs in dodder capsules, such as Cuscuta and Fo-ti, have been traditionally used to calm the nervous system and balance hormonal imbalances. By supporting thyroid health, these capsules can alleviate symptoms like anxiety, tremors, and weight loss, providing natural relief for individuals suffering from hyperthyroidism.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic property: Helps regulate the body's response to stress, which is often associated with hyperthyroidism, by promoting balance and harmony in the endocrine system.
Anti-inflammatory property: Reduces inflammation in the thyroid gland and surrounding tissues, which can contribute to hyperthyroid symptoms such as swelling, pain, and fatigue.

Antioxidant property: Neutralizes free radicals that can damage thyroid tissue and disrupt thyroid function, helping to protect the gland from oxidative stress and promote healthy thyroid functioning.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds that help regulate thyroid hormone levels and alleviate symptoms such as anxiety, insomnia, and rapid heartbeat.
Barks: Contains flavonoids and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to reduce thyroid-related inflammation and oxidative stress.
remedy_recipe: Gather one hundred grams of dried cuscuta chinensis herbs, forty-eight grams of astragalus membranaceus powder and thirty-two grams of rehmannia glutinosa extract.
Grind the cuscuta chinensis herbs into a fine powder using a mill or grinder for five minutes to ensure optimal extraction.
Mix one hundred grams of the powdered cuscuta chinensis with forty-eight grams of astragalus membranaceus powder and thirty-two grams of rehmannia glutinosa extract in a large bowl.
Add three hundred milliliters of boiling water to the mixture and allow it to steep for twenty minutes, then filter out any solids using cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve.
Fill empty capsules with one gram each of the filtered mixture and store them in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they support the liver's natural detoxification processes, which can be compromised in individuals with hyperthyroidism. The herbs in dandelion capsules, such as taraxasterol and taraxol, have been shown to enhance bile production and stimulate the elimination of toxins from the body, including those produced by an overactive thyroid gland. By promoting healthy liver function, dandelion capsules may help reduce symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism, including fatigue, weight loss, and anxiety.
remedy_properties: Choleretic property: Dandelion capsules increase bile production, which helps to remove excess thyroid hormones from the body, reducing their negative effects on metabolism and overall health.

Diuretic property: The diuretic properties of dandelion capsules help to reduce fluid retention caused by hyperthyroidism, alleviating symptoms such as swelling, bloating, and weight loss despite increased appetite.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties: Dandelion's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds help protect the thyroid gland from damage caused by oxidative stress and inflammation, which can exacerbate hyperthyroidism.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in inulin, a prebiotic fiber that can help regulate thyroid function and alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism.
Rhyzomes: Containing a high concentration of antioxidants and phenolic compounds, which can help mitigate oxidative stress and inflammation associated with hyperthyroidism.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh dandelion roots and dry them thoroughly in a warm place for at least 2 weeks.
Grind dried dandelion roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered dandelion root with enough water to create a smooth paste consistency then fill capsules with 250mg each.
Allow the filled capsules to dry for at least an hour before storing them in airtight containers away from direct sunlight.
Store the finished capsules in a cool dark place for up to 6 months and consume 2-3 times daily as needed.

remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory activity: Purple Coneflower's flavonoids and phenolic acids exhibit anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation caused by thyroid hormones in hyperthyroidism patients.

Antioxidant effects: The herb's antioxidants can neutralize free radicals generated by oxidative stress associated with hyperthyroidism, thereby reducing tissue damage and promoting overall well-being.

Immune system modulation: Purple Coneflower has been shown to modulate the immune response, potentially helping to regulate an overactive thyroid gland (hyperthyroidism) by balancing the body's defense mechanisms.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the purple coneflower contain anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce thyroid inflammation, which can alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism.
Seeds: Purple coneflower seeds have been traditionally used to treat thyroid issues due to their ability to normalize thyroid function and reduce thyroid hormone production.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality echinacea purpurea roots and clean them thoroughly under running water.
Dry the echinacea purpurea roots in a warm, well-ventilated area for 7 days or until they are brittle.
Grind 30 grams of dried echinacea purpurea roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered echinacea with 60 grams of cornstarch and fill #0 empty capsules according to manufacturer's guidelines.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool, dark place for up to 6 months or longer if refrigerated.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Purple coneflower capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they contain compounds that have been shown to modulate thyroid function, reducing excessive hormone production. The capsules' active ingredients, including triterpenoids and polyphenols, may help regulate the immune system's response to thyrocytes, thereby alleviating symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as rapid heartbeat, weight loss, and anxiety. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory properties of purple coneflower may also contribute to its therapeutic effects in managing this condition.

English lavender capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they have a calming effect on the thyroid gland, reducing its overactive state. The herb has a natural ability to soothe anxiety and stress, which are often exacerbated by hyperthyroidism. By promoting relaxation and reducing cortisol levels, English lavender can help regulate an overactive thyroid, alleviating symptoms such as rapid heartbeat, sweating, and weight loss. Additionally, the capsules may help improve sleep quality, allowing the body to recover from the constant stimulation caused by hyperthyroidism.
remedy_properties: Anxiolytic and Sedative Properties: Lavender's calming effects can help reduce stress and anxiety, which are common symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism, by promoting relaxation and improving sleep quality.

Antioxidant and Anti-Inflammatory Activities: Lavender's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties may help reduce the production of thyroid hormones and alleviate inflammation in the thyroid gland, thereby alleviating symptoms of hyperthyroidism.

Thyroid-Stabilizing Effects: Some studies suggest that lavender may have a positive impact on thyroid function by stabilizing hormone production and reducing excessive thyroid activity, which can help alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as rapid heartbeat, sweating, and weight loss.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are good for making medicinal capsules as they contain a high concentration of flavonoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism.

Seeds: The seeds are used due to their rich content of omega-3 fatty acids and antioxidants, which may help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, common issues in individuals with hyperthyroidism.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried lavandula angustifolia flowers in the morning after dew has evaporated and before midday sun reaches peak intensity.
Combine one tablespoon of dried lavandula angustifolia flowers with one cup of boiling water to create a tea infusion.
Steep the mixture for 15-20 minutes then strain the liquid through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass container.
Measure out 250 milligrams of the cooled herbal tea extract and encapsulate in vegan capsules using a capsule filling machine.
Store the finished capsules in an airtight glass container at room temperature away from direct sunlight for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Valerian capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they promote a good night's sleep, which is often disrupted in individuals suffering from this condition. Hyperthyroidism can cause restlessness, anxiety, and insomnia, making it challenging to get quality sleep. Valerian root has been traditionally used to calm the nervous system, reducing stress and anxiety levels. By promoting deep and restful sleep, valerian capsules can help alleviate symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism, such as fatigue, mood swings, and irritability. This natural remedy can be a valuable addition to traditional treatment plans.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic Properties: Valerian root helps regulate the body's response to stress, which is often exacerbated in individuals with hyperthyroidism, allowing for a sense of calm and reducing symptoms like anxiety and insomnia.

GABA-Enhancing Properties: Valerian root contains compounds that increase GABA (Gamma-Aminobutyric Acid) levels in the brain, promoting relaxation, reducing anxiety and stress, and helping to regulate thyroid function.

Antioxidant and Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Valerian root has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the body, potentially alleviating symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as fatigue and weight loss.
remedy_parts: Roots: Valerian roots have a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as anxiety and restlessness.
Rhizomes: Valerian rhizomes contain compounds that have been shown to reduce cortisol levels, leading to improved sleep quality and reduced stress.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried valeriana officinalis roots and leaves for 30 minutes.
Dry the harvested material at room temperature in the shade for 7 days.
Grind the dried valeriana into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Mix 250mg of ground valeriana with 500mg of gelatin capsules and fill each capsule for 10 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they contain antioxidants and flavonoids that help to reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland, thus alleviating symptoms of hyperthyroidism. The capsules also contain compounds that have a regulatory effect on the body's metabolic rate, helping to balance out an overactive thyroid gland. Additionally, the antioxidant properties of maidenhair tree may help to protect the thyroid gland from damage caused by free radicals, further reducing inflammation and promoting overall health.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic Properties: Herbal Maidenhair Tree Capsules have adaptogenic properties, which allow them to help regulate thyroid function by adapting to changing hormonal demands, reducing stress on the thyroid gland, and promoting balance.

Antioxidant Activity: Herbal Maidenhair Tree Capsules contain antioxidants that neutralize free radicals, which can damage thyroid tissue and disrupt its function, leading to an overactive thyroid gland.

Anti-inflammatory Effects: Herbal Maidenhair Tree Capsules have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland and surrounding tissues, which can contribute to hyperthyroidism symptoms such as joint pain and fatigue.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, the roots of maidenhair tree help regulate thyroid function and alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as rapid heartbeat and weight loss.
Barks: The barks of maidenhair tree contain anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland and alleviate associated pain.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 10 grams of dried ginkgo biloba leaves from a reputable source and store them in an airtight container.
Grind the ginkgo biloba leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Mix the powdered ginkgo biloba with 100mg of dried ashwagandha root and 50mg of dried lemon balm leaf in a bowl.
Add 500ml of distilled water to the mixture and simmer it at 70°c for 20 minutes while stirring occasionally.
Fill clean gelatin capsules with 250mg of the filtered herbal extract and store them in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Brahmi capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they contain a unique combination of herbs that work together to reduce the symptoms of this condition. The herb brahmi, also known as Bacopa monnieri, has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to enhance memory and cognitive function, but it has also been found to have a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help alleviate the anxiety and restlessness often associated with hyperthyroidism. Additionally, Brahmi capsules may help regulate thyroid hormone production and metabolism, promoting overall health and well-being.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Brahmi capsules contain antioxidants that help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation caused by thyroid hormone imbalance, thereby alleviating symptoms of hyperthyroidism.

Adaptogenic properties: Brahmi has adaptogenic properties that help the body adapt to stressful situations, including hormonal imbalances, which can aid in reducing symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as anxiety, insomnia, and fatigue.

Thyroid-regulating properties: Brahmi has been traditionally used to regulate thyroid function, helping to normalize thyroid hormone levels and alleviate symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism, such as rapid heart rate, weight loss, and heat intolerance.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Brahmi are used to make medicinal capsules because they contain bioactive compounds that help regulate thyroid function and alleviate symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism.

Rhyzomes: Brahmi's rhyzomes are utilized in capsule production due to their rich content of saponins, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that benefit hyperthyroid patients.
remedy_recipe: Measure and dry one hundred grams of fresh bacopa monnieri leaves and stems for processing.
Crush the dried bacopa monnieri into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or coffee grinder for 5 minutes.
Mix one part powdered bacopa monnieri with two parts excipient such as silicon dioxide or calcium carbonate in a bowl for 10 minutes.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with the prepared mixture, dividing it evenly among the capsules within 30 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature away from direct sunlight for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maypop capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they contain Passiflora incarnata, a natural herb that has been traditionally used to calm the nervous system and reduce stress. Hyperthyroidism is often accompanied by anxiety and insomnia, which can exacerbate symptoms of the condition. The calming effects of maypop capsules can help alleviate these symptoms, promoting relaxation and reducing the body's overall stress response. By addressing the underlying emotional and psychological components of hyperthyroidism, maypop capsules may help to improve overall symptom management and quality of life.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Maypop capsules contain antioxidants that help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to the development and progression of hyperthyroidism.

Adaptogenic properties: Maypop has been traditionally used as an adaptogen to help regulate the body's response to stress, including hormonal imbalances like hyperthyroidism, by normalizing cortisol and thyroid hormone levels.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in Maypop capsules can help reduce inflammation and swelling associated with hyperthyroidism, which can alleviate symptoms such as tremors, anxiety, and weight loss.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help regulate thyroid hormone production and reduce inflammation associated with hyperthyroidism.
Barks: Contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that have been shown to inhibit the activity of thyroid hormones, reducing their excessive production in hyperthyroid patients.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh passiflora incarnata flowers in the morning after dew has dried but before noon for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested flowers using a food dehydrator on low heat setting for 12 hours or until crispy dryness is achieved.
Grind the dried flowers into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or spice grinder for about 30 minutes to ensure uniformity.
Mix the powdered passiflora incarnata with 200mg of gelatin in a bowl, adding water as needed to create a thick paste, taking about 15 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the herbal mixture, using a capsule filler or spoon, and seal immediately to preserve potency for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: St John's Wort capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they contain bioactive compounds that have been shown to inhibit the conversion of T4 to T3, a process that can contribute to an overactive thyroid gland. Additionally, St John's Wort has been found to reduce levels of thyroid-stimulating hormone (TSH), which is often elevated in individuals with hyperthyroidism. By addressing these underlying hormonal imbalances, St John's Wort capsules may help alleviate symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism, such as anxiety, insomnia, and rapid heartbeat.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic flavonoids: Flavonoids present in St. John's Wort may help regulate thyroid function by adapting to changing hormone levels and reducing oxidative stress, which can contribute to hyperthyroid symptoms.

Antioxidant phenolic acids: Phenolic acids in St. John's Wort have been shown to reduce inflammation and oxidative damage in the body, which may help alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as heat intolerance, anxiety, and fatigue.

Stress-reducing lignans: Lignans in St. John's Wort are known for their anxiolytic (anxiety-reducing) effects, which can be beneficial in managing the emotional and psychological symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in hyperforin, a compound that helps regulate thyroid hormones and reduce hyperthyroid symptoms.
Barks: Contain flavonoids and oligopeptides that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality hypericum perforatum plants with yellow flowers in mid-summer and dry them according to local regulations.
Grind 10 grams of dried hypericum perforatum into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or coffee grinder.
Mix the powdered st. john's wort with 20 grams of organic cornstarch and store it in an airtight container for up to six months.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 250-500 milligrams of the powdered st. john's wort mixture and seal them tightly.
Label and date the filled capsules, storing them in a cool dark place for up to two years.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat hyperthyroidism with herbal capsules is to choose a supplement that contains a blend of herbs such as Bladderwrack, Ashwagandha, and Licorice root. These herbs have been traditionally used to help regulate thyroid function and reduce symptoms like anxiety, insomnia, and rapid heartbeat. Look for a product that is standardized to ensure consistent potency and follow the recommended dosage to achieve optimal results.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to hyperthyroidism that are treated with herbal capsules are Graves' disease, thyroiditis, and Hashimoto's thyroiditis. These conditions all involve abnormalities in thyroid function, such as overactive or underactive thyroid hormones. Herbal capsules containing ingredients like ashwagandha, astragalus, and bladderwrack may help to regulate thyroid function, reduce symptoms of fatigue, weight changes, and anxiety, and promote overall well-being.
